fn compute_running_sums(data: &[f64]) -> Vec<f64> {
    let mut sums = Vec::with_capacity(data.len());
    // BAD: repeated indexing causes bounds checks
    for i in 0..data.len() {
        let mut total = 0.0;
        for j in 0..=i {
            total += data[j];
        }
        sums.push(total);
    }
    sums
}

fn find_local_maxima(data: &[i32]) -> Vec<usize> {
    let mut result = Vec::new();
    // BAD: repeated indexing in tight loop
    for i in 1..data.len() - 1 {
        if data[i] > data[i - 1] && data[i] > data[i + 1] {
            result.push(i);
        }
    }
    result
}
